sections.paragraph:
Original: גּבּי

Transliteration: gabbay

Phonetic: gab-bah'ee

BDB Definition:

Gabbai = "my back"
  1. the head of an important Benjamite family living in Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah

Origin: from the same as H1354

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
